column1: query
{"prompt": "Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription last month. Can I get a refund for the duplicate charge?"}
{"prompt": "My dashboard keeps showing a 502 error whenever I try to load my project analytics."}
{"prompt": "I'd like to change the email address associated with my account."}

{"prompt": "The API endpoint /v2/droplets returns a 500 error when I include the tag_name parameter."}

{"prompt": "My application's environment variables aren't loading after the last deployment."}
{"prompt": "I need to recover my account but I no longer have access to my phone for 2FA codes."}
